publishedAbstract: The DevWorkspace Controller in Openshift can sometimes block the use of Ceph commands, either in the rook-ceph-tools pod or the rook-ceph-operator pod, firing an `Internal error occurred: failed calling webhook "validate-exec.devworkspace-controller.svc"` error. The [Not able to open a Remote Shell to any Containers in RHOCP 4](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/6971276) solution generally resolves this issue. However, there are instances where a customer does not want to delete the devworkspace. This solution will serve in lieu of deleting the `mutatingwebhookconfigurations controller.devfile.io` and `validatingwebhookconfigurations controller.devfile.io` CRs.
publishedTitle: Unable to Use Ceph Commands in Openshift Data Foundation (ODF) in the rook-ceph-tools or rook-ceph-operator Pods "Internal error occurred: failed calling webhook "validate-exec.devworkspace-controller.svc": failed to call webhook"
